description_long: This armchair features a deep, wide seat and a high, gently curved backrest, all upholstered in dark brown leather with a classic diamond-tufted pattern. The backrest and inner arms are adorned with deep button tufting, giving it a luxurious and traditional appearance. The armrests are integrated into the sides, smoothly curving from the backrest and tapering down toward the seat, providing a seamless and enveloping form. The chair sits on four short, outward-angled wooden legs, which add a touch of mid-century modern style and stability. The leather upholstery has a slightly distressed, matte finish, contributing to a vintage yet sophisticated look. Overall, the chair exudes comfort and elegance, making it suitable for upscale urban interiors or stylish public spaces.
description: A dark brown, diamond-tufted leather armchair with a high, curved backrest and short, angled wooden legs. The design is both luxurious and vintage, with integrated armrests and a wide, inviting seat.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, deep seat, high tufted backrest, and integrated armrests with button detailing.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the chair's gentle backward slope, thick cushioning, and the outward angle of the wooden legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, unadorned leather back and the full width of the chair's backrest.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the continuous curve from backrest to armrest and the sturdy wooden legs.
attribute_backrest_style: high, curved, diamond-tufted with button detailing
